item.title: Ultrasensitive and Reusable Photonic Crystal Microfluidic Sensor Based on Fluorinated Porous Polymer Networks for Detection of Per- and Polyfluoroalkyl Substances
item.description:
Publication date: Available online 18 June 2026

Source: Sensors and Actuators B: Chemical

Author(s): Hui-Ling Hsu, Feng-Ping Lin, Yi‑Ling Chen, Chien-Hsing Lu, Jem-Kun Chen

item.title: Lab on Tip: Metasurface-Microtip Integrated on Fiber-Optic Endface for Synchronous Sensing of Krypton Gas, Temperature and Humidity
item.description:
Publication date: 15 November 2026

Source: Sensors and Actuators B: Chemical, Volume 467, Part 1

Author(s): Yu Yang, Feng Zhang, Cheng Ren, Shuhan Jiang, Wen-Qing Wei, Feng Xia, Wenyu Yan, Ling-Xin Kong
